## Description

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Connector / integration
- [ ] Widget / UI

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend compiles: `python -m compileall backend`
- [ ] Frontend builds cleanly: `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] Frontend lint passes: `cd frontend && npm run lint`
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or `.env` files
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, `CLAUDE.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] My changes generate no new errors or warnings
